nodes.name: design-system.css
nodes.summary: Design system CSS with theme variables, color tokens, typography, spacing, agent colors, and Tailwind overrides

nodes.name: lightTheme
nodes.summary: Light theme using OKLCH colors: warm sand background, orange primary accent, warm text/foreground

nodes.name: darkTheme
nodes.summary: Dark theme using OKLCH colors: dark background (#151313), golden sand primary, muted warm text

nodes.name: paddingScaleSpacing
nodes.summary: Tailwind spacing scale overridden with --padding-scale multiplier for responsive padding

nodes.name: agentColorSystem
nodes.summary: Agent color system with classes agent-primary, agent-info, agent-keyword, agent-success, agent-function, agent-number, agent-type, agent-warning, agent-variable and badge/dot/list-item styles

nodes.name: interactiveStateTokens
nodes.summary: Interactive state color tokens: interactive-hover, interactive-active, interactive-selection, interactive-border-hover/focus, interactive-focus-ring
